data.body:
## Description

After ca7b-9e9b adds `bidirectional_test_coverage` dimension to tdd.md, update `plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/docs/review-criteria.md` to include this dimension in the TDD reviewer dimension list and update the caller schema hash (used by validate-review-output.sh).

The existing review-criteria.md lists all TDD dimensions (tdd_discipline, test_isolation, red_green_sequence, test_boundary_coverage, red_test_dependency, exemption_justification). Add `bidirectional_test_coverage` to this list.

Regenerate the caller schema hash by running:
`".claude/scripts/dso validate-review-output.sh" --update-hash implementation-plan`
(or manually updating the hash if the command doesn't support auto-update)

TDD exemption: Static asset (criterion 3 — updating a dimension list in a Markdown reference file with no conditional logic).

### File Impact
- Edit: `plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/docs/review-criteria.md`

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] review-criteria.md lists bidirectional_test_coverage
  Verify: grep -q "bidirectional_test_coverage" plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/docs/review-criteria.md
- [ ] Dimension appears in TDD reviewer row
  Verify: grep -A5 "TDD" plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/docs/review-criteria.md | grep -q "bidirectional_test_coverage"
